artifact.name: BD_04_EVIDENCE_LIFECYCLE_SPEC_LOCK_REPORT.json
artifact.title: Evidence request, upload, review and sufficiency lifecycle

ticket_contract.work_type: Process Workflow / Data Lifecycle / UI Interaction
ticket_contract.unique_shape: Full lifecycle slice; requires state machine and data I/O before UI details.
ticket_contract.execution_decision: Create lifecycle spec, data contract and sufficiency decision proof as separate subtasks.
ticket_contract.overclaim_guard: Upload UI is not evidence lifecycle without review state, sufficiency decision and process output.

dependency_decisions_applied.effect: Current-user, tenant, role, payload and object-scope layers are separate. Evidence actions require explicit role/object scope and cannot be inferred from route access.
Admin/security cannot force evidence sufficiency, compliance release, export approval or client visibility.

completed_subtasks.name: Evidence lifecycle state model
completed_subtasks.summary: Locked request/upload/review/link/reject/sufficiency/release state model across process-request and document-review axes.

completed_subtasks.name: Upload and review data contract
completed_subtasks.summary: Locked upload/review API inputs, persisted rows, safe response shapes, projection redaction and audit event mappings.

completed_subtasks.name: Sufficiency decision guard
completed_subtasks.summary: Locked canonical DECIDE_EVIDENCE_SUFFICIENCY guard, positive case, eight negative cases, release integration and client/internal projection split.

canonical_decisions.consequence: Document upload may create Document, DocumentVersion, DocumentExtraction, EvidenceRecord, EvidenceItem and AuditEvent, but it cannot create evidence sufficiency, release, export, client visibility or client acceptance.
Analyst/advisor/compliance review may move evidence to linked or insufficient states, but final sufficiency needs compliance-only accepted predicates.

canonical_decisions.decision: Journey-level EvidenceSufficiencyDecision is canonical for P0 business-process sufficiency.
canonical_decisions.consequence: Document review sufficiency remains scoped evidence support unless it is consumed by or mapped to the canonical journey sufficiency decision.

canonical_decisions.decision: Sufficiency is necessary but not sufficient for compliance release.
canonical_decisions.consequence: Release still requires advisor approval, payload readiness, compliance permission, audit persistence, rationale/redaction where applicable and exact release controls.

canonical_decisions.decision: Client decision view is intentionally redacted.
canonical_decisions.consequence: Client roles can see decision and decidedAt only; evidenceRecordId, reason, audit metadata, storageKey and checksum remain internal unless released through a client-safe projection.

commands_run.command: pnpm playwright test tests/workflow-gate.spec.ts tests/evidence-review-api.spec.ts tests/document-upload-api.spec.ts tests/pp002-evidence-sufficiency-canonical.spec.ts --workers=1

validation.positive_acceptance_result: Evidence lifecycle, persistence and sufficiency guards are already implemented and proven in existing code/tests; BD-04 locks the process-first contract.
validation.negative_acceptance_result: Upload-only, unreviewed, unlinked, restricted, wrong-scope, audit-unavailable, analyst, admin, cross-tenant and release-without-evidence paths fail closed in tests.

product_code_delta.reason: Existing implementation already satisfies BD-04 state/data/guard requirements. This ticket produced contract/proof artifacts and did not need product code changes.

ui_delta.reason: No UI was changed; screenshot evidence would be misleading for this spec/proof lock.

bold_cleanup_recommendations: Make DECIDE_EVIDENCE_SUFFICIENCY the only P0 journey-level sufficiency source of truth.
Do not let document upload, document review, admin governance, or screenshot proof stand in for evidence sufficiency.
Rename any future UI state that says 'approved evidence' unless it includes the scoped gate and canonical decision source.
Demote any legacy evidence UI that cannot show request, upload, review, insufficiency, sufficiency and release separation.
Eventually migrate roleKey/tenantSlug demo APIs behind CurrentUserContext adapters so P0 security proof does not depend on query/body role switches.
remaining_limits: BD-04 did not add new UI; it only locked the state/data/guard contract against existing implementation.
BD-04 does not implement BD-05 internal workbench UI refactor.
BD-04 does not solve later no-client-leak draft gates, audit persistence spine hardening or export redaction beyond the tested sufficiency/release integration.

next_ticket.title: Internal workbench and action board as real process workspace
next_ticket.expected_work_type: UX Refactor / Work Queue / Role Tasking
